positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition of glowing celestial flora and deep-space fauna, depicting luminous crescent moons, interwoven nebula branches, and majestic stylized bioluminescent butterflies. The composition must be perfectly centered and contained within a clean, high-contrast silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Use a deep midnight blue and indigo background gradient contrasted sharply with vibrant glowing cyan, electric magenta, and ethereal gold accents. Intricate linework, ornate details, highly detailed, vector art aesthetic, graphic novel quality, symmetrical, flat graphic design, digital illustration, --v 5.1
